title: rubus × argenteiformis
intro: Rubus × argenteiformis, also known as the silver-leaved raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × argenteiformis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Rubus × argenteiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
